name: 17"x36" Rounded Bath Mat White - Room Essentials™
description:
Add comfort and style to your bathroom decor with this Rounded Bath Mat from Room Essentials™. This round bath mat boasts an allover raised pattern with suction cups on the back to create a firm grip on the shower surface. Easy to integrate into any bath decor style or color scheme, the plastic bath mat can be spot or wiped clean for easy maintenance and care.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
